author: vvo
subject: chore(deps): use yarn for dev/release/website
body:
goal: Safen our developer environement and documentation website generation by
locking our dependencies. It does not means the dependencies of
react-instantsearch (the package) will be locked, only that what we use
to:
- develop
- release
- build the website

will be safe and consistent across all the various environements
(travis, dev algolia/react-instantsearch#1, dev #23).
